Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Queries Dream for live inventory data on all catalog-matched parts, identifying what DFC currently stocks versus what is absent from inventory.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Produces an accurate in-stock vs. gap picture instantly, replacing manual inventory lookups that would otherwise require back-and-forth with the warehouse team.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Structures the catalog and inventory data into a clean, formatted Excel-ready output, labeling what DFC stocks, what's missing, and organizing rows by part category.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Removes manual spreadsheet formatting work and ensures the output is immediately usable by Mark without cleanup or reformatting.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails the completed Excel catalog file directly to Mark with a summary of what was found for the submitted vehicle.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers the finished catalog to Mark's inbox within minutes of form submission, making the entire research-to-output cycle self-serve and near-instant.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report — including on-hand quantities, open purchase orders, and in-transit shipments.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent manual lookups by centralizing all inventory intelligence into one automated pull, saving hours of duplicated effort each week.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches each line of the backorder report with the live Dream inventory data, flags parts with no on-hand, on-order, or in-transit source as dead-ends requiring escalation.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Creates a single enriched report that shows exactly where each part stands, eliminating confusion and ensuring dead-end parts are visible and actionable before customers follow up.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for backorder updates, tailored to each order's current status and flagged issues.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Cuts the time spent writing individual customer updates from hours to minutes, and ensures every affected customer gets a timely, accurate status message without manual drafting.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all available two-piece rotor fitments by make, model, and year.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds a comprehensive market-wide fitment reference in minutes instead of the days it would take to manually browse three separate vendor catalogs.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor fitments against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify which applications DFC already covers and which are gaps.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly reveals where DFC has competitive coverage and where market opportunities exist, giving Dino an actionable gap analysis without manual comparison.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers asking them to confirm demand for specific two-piece rotor applications where gaps were identified.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gathers real demand signal from the market proactively, so product decisions are driven by customer data rather than internal assumptions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles the full output — scraped fitments, DFC cross-reference results, coverage gaps, and customer demand responses — into one formatted reference sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a single, organized decision-ready document that consolidates all research and demand data, enabling Dino to prioritize catalog expansion without any manual assembly.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active Meta and TikTok ad creatives and copy fields to extract the full text from every running ad for phrase-level analysis.
Meta Investigation.impact: Captures every word in every live ad instantly, making it possible to audit the entire active ad portfolio on demand rather than manually opening individual ads.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all extracted ad copy for specified target phrases, identifying exact matches and flagging the ad ID, campaign, and specific field where each match appears.
Meta Investigation.impact: Eliminates manual text searching across potentially hundreds of ads, delivering precise match locations in seconds with no risk of human error or missed instances.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a structured email report listing every flagged ad, the exact field where the phrase was found, and the matching copy excerpt.
Meta Investigation.impact: Puts a complete, actionable compliance or QA report in the right person's inbox immediately, enabling fast takedown or edits without any dashboard navigation.

Paid Channel Chat bot.action: Pulls live campaign data — spend, impressions, CTR, ROAS, and ad copy — from both Meta and TikTok into a unified data layer the chatbot can query.
Paid Channel Chat bot.impact: Gives the chatbot a real-time, cross-platform view of paid performance, so answers reflect actual current data rather than exports or cached reports.

Paid Channel Chat bot.action: Interprets natural language questions about paid channel performance and responds with accurate, data-backed answers drawn from the connected Meta and TikTok data.
Paid Channel Chat bot.impact: Lets any team member get instant answers about campaign performance without building reports, waiting for an analyst, or learning the ad platforms directly.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox, detects incoming applications, and extracts the resume and cover letter content from each email.
Resume Bot.impact: Ensures every application is captured and processed immediately, eliminating the risk of candidates being missed or sitting unreviewed in a shared inbox.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF to an organized Drive folder, structured by role and applicant name for easy retrieval.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a clean, searchable archive of all applicant files automatically, removing manual file management and ensuring nothing is lost in email threads.

Resume Bot.action: Scores each resume against the requirements of open roles, classifies the applicant as approved, denied, or pending based on role availability, and drafts the appropriate auto-reply.
Resume Bot.impact: Removes hours of manual resume screening and ensures every candidate gets a consistent, fair evaluation and a timely response regardless of application volume.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every applicant with their score, decision, role, and Drive file link into a dashboard, routing pending candidates to a dedicated Pending tab for future review.
Resume Bot.impact: Gives hiring managers a live, organized view of the entire applicant pipeline with no manual data entry, and ensures paused-role candidates are never lost or forgotten.

summary: The pipeline currently stands at 56 total agents — 29 Completed, 10 In Progress, and 17 Planned — reflecting continued steady growth across our AI automation program. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week. We did have one notable stage update: the Paid Channel Chatbot moved to Completed, giving the team an on-demand tool to quickly query and interact with paid channel data. Great work to everyone involved in pushing that one across the finish line!
